bullets: Monitored Amazon Robotics (ARS) automation floor during launch-stage operations — enforcing amnesty zones, clearing obstructions, and maintaining safe pod/drive flow.
Investigated pod, drive unit, and workstation issues on the floor; escalated recurring defects and documented patterns to support process improvement.
Coordinated amnesty events, ensured safe robot re-entry after floor interventions, and communicated status to ops leadership in real time.
